text: chzvn 'bdyh khh-'mr 'dny yhvh l'dvm shmv'h shm'nv m't yhvh vtsyr bgvym shlch qvmv vnqvmh 'lyh lmlchmh
hnh qtn nttykh bgvym bzvy 'th m'd
zdvn lbkh hshy'kh shkhny bchgvy-sl' mrvm shbtv 'mr blbv my yvrdny 'rts
'm-tgbyh khnshr v'm-byn khvkhbym shym qnkh mshm 'vrydkh n'm-yhvh
'm-gnbym b'v-lkh 'm-shvddy lylh 'ykh ndmyth hlv' ygnbv dym 'm-btsrym b'v lkh hlv' ysh'yrv 'llvt
'ykh nchfshv 'shv nb'v mtsfnyv
'd-hgbvl shlchvkh khl 'nshy brytkh hshy'vkh ykhlv lkh 'nshy shlmkh lchmkh yshymv mzvr tchtykh 'yn tbvnh bv
hlv' byvm hhv' n'm  yhvh vh'bdty chkhmym m'dvm vtbvnh mhr 'shv
vchtv gbvrykh tymn lm'n ykhrt-'ysh mhr 'shv mqtl
mchms 'chykh y'qb tkhskh bvshh vnkhrt l'vlm
byvm 'mdkh mngd byvm shbvt zrym chylv vnkhrym b'v [sh'rv kh] (sh'ryv q) v'l-yrvshlm ydv gvrl gm-'th kh'chd mhm
v'l-tr' byvm-'chykh byvm nkhrv v'l-tshmch lbny-yhvdh byvm 'bdm v'l-tgdl fykh byvm tsrh
'l-tbv' bsh'r-'my byvm 'ydm 'l-tr' gm-'th br'tv byvm 'ydv v'l-tshlchnh bchylv byvm 'ydv
v'l-t'md 'l-hfrq lhkhryt 't-flytyv v'l-tsgr shrydyv byvm tsrh
khy-qrvb yvm-yhvh 'l-khl-hgvym kh'shr 'shyt y'shh lkh gmlkh yshvb br'shkh
khy kh'shr shtytm 'l-hr qdshy yshtv khl-hgvym tmyd vshtv vl'v vhyv khlv' hyv
vbhr tsyvn thyh flyth vhyh qdsh vyrshv  byt y'qb 't mvrshyhm
vhyh byt-y'qb 'sh vbyt yvsf lhbh vbyt 'shv lqsh vdlqv bhm v'khlvm vl'-yhyh  shryd lbyt 'shv khy yhvh dbr
vyrshv hngb 't-hr 'shv vhshflh 't-flshtym vyrshv 't-shdh 'frym v't shdh shmrvn vbnymn 't-hgl'd
vglt hchl-hzh lbny yshr'l 'shr-khn'nym 'd-tsrft vglt yrvshlm 'shr bsfrd yrshv 't 'ry hngb
v'lv mvsh'ym bhr tsyvn lshft 't-hr 'shv vhyth lyhvh hmlvkhh
